subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Kingdom of God! Although the outpourings of the Supreme Pen and the surging waves of the Ocean of Nún, which are mentioned in the Qur'án [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت الهی اگرچه رشحات قلم اعلی و طفحات بحر نون که در فرقان مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @poems and quotation from poetry
